channel.title: Comments on: After the Deadline Plugin for bbPress now Live on WordPress.com Forums!

item.title: By: Andelia
item.dc:creator: Andelia
item.description: Hi.I like reading your post , keep doing it.
item.content:encoded: Hi.I like reading your post , keep doing it.

item.title: By: Taranfx
item.dc:creator: Taranfx
item.description: Did you ind this plugin useful? It never fixed things for me. I still rely on elf-proof reading
item.content:encoded: Did you ind this plugin useful? It never fixed things for me. I still rely on elf-proof reading

item.title: By: Dave Batterson
item.dc:creator: Dave Batterson
item.description:
Sweet plugin.. Just added it to my forum.. Thanks!
- Dave
item.content:encoded:
Sweet plugin.. Just added it to my forum.. Thanks!

– Dave
